overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage of a red-haired character in wizard robes exploring a gothic castle interior. The character ascends and descends narrow stone staircases, walks along balconies overlooking a grand hall with ornate stained glass, and explores a vast candlelit great hall with high vaulted ceilings.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow stone stairwell with wooden steps

agents.ego_description: climbing a narrow spiral staircase with rough stone walls, passing suits of armor and wall-mounted weapons

entered.detail: rough-hewn brown stone blocks forming the stairwell walls
worn wooden steps spiraling upward
medieval full plate armor standing against the wall
long weapon with axe head mounted on the stone wall
small rectangular window with stone frame letting in dim light
iron lantern with warm yellow flame mounted on the wall

segments.scene_description: The character ascends a narrow, dimly lit spiral staircase with rough stone walls and wooden steps. Medieval suits of armor and weapons decorate the walls, illuminated by warm wall sconces.

scene_state.functional_zone: elevated balcony overlooking great hall with large stained glass windows

events.description: exits narrow stairwell through arched doorway into open balcony area with high ceilings
approaches large teal stained glass window with intricate geometric patterns

agents.ego_description: walking along a wooden balcony with ornate railings, pausing to look down at the great hall below through the stained glass windows

entered.detail: gothic stone archway marking the transition from stairwell to balcony
hooded stone figure standing in a niche
large teal and green stained glass window with art nouveau patterns
carved wooden balustrade along the balcony edge
thick stone columns supporting the balcony structure
view down to the lower level of the grand hall with warm lighting

segments.scene_description: The character emerges from the stairwell onto an elevated balcony overlooking a vast great hall. Large stained glass windows with teal patterns illuminate the space with colored light. The character walks along the wooden balcony, glancing down at the hall below.

scene_state.functional_zone: castle corridor with arched windows transitioning to spiral staircase

events.description: leaves the open balcony corridor and enters a darker enclosed spiral staircase

agents.ego_description: walking through a stone corridor with large arched windows, then entering and beginning to descend a narrow spiral staircase

entered.detail: tall gothic window with multiple panes set in stone wall
heavy wooden door with iron studs at the end of the corridor
narrow winding stone staircase descending into darkness

segments.scene_description: The character leaves the balcony and walks along a stone corridor with arched windows, then enters a darker, narrower spiral staircase and begins descending.

scene_state.functional_zone: dimly lit spiral staircase with wooden railings

agents.ego_description: descending a tight spiral staircase with wooden railings, the walls lit by sparse wall sconces casting warm orange light

segments.scene_description: The character continues down the narrow spiral staircase, the environment becoming dimmer with reddish-orange lighting from wall sconces. A wooden door appears at the bottom of the stairs.

scene_state.functional_zone: grand castle great hall with high vaulted ceilings and ornate iron gates

events.description: exits narrow stairwell through wooden door into vast open great hall with high ceilings
looks up to reveal massive circular stained glass rose window high above

agents.ego_description: entering a vast candlelit great hall, looking up at the towering architecture and stained glass windows while walking toward the center

notable_agents.action: group of students in blue uniforms gathered near the ornate iron gates

entered.detail: vast open hall with high vaulted ceilings and stone columns
elaborate wrought iron gates with decorative scrollwork
massive circular stained glass window with teal and green geometric patterns high on the wall
large iron chandelier with multiple candles hanging from the ceiling
round mechanical clock with roman numerals mounted on the stone wall

segments.scene_description: The character enters a magnificent great hall with soaring ceilings, massive stone pillars, and warm candlelight. A huge stained glass rose window dominates the far wall. Other students stand near ornate iron gates to the right as the character explores the space, looking up at the architecture.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement that ascends from a dimly lit stairwell to a high balcony before descending into a magnificent, candlelit great hall. It begins as the character climbs a narrow spiral staircase lined with suits of armor and warm wall sconces, eventually emerging onto an elevated wooden balcony overlooking a vast space bathed in teal light from stained glass windows. The scene then shifts as the character moves through a stone corridor with arched windows and enters a second, darker spiral staircase, where the lighting transitions to a deep reddish-orange. As the character reaches the bottom and passes through a wooden door, the environment opens up into a soaring great hall characterized by massive stone pillars and warm candlelight. The movement finally concludes with the character exploring the expansive architecture beneath a dominant stained glass rose window while other students gather near ornate iron gates.
